resources.string: Let\'s pick some defaults. You can always change these things later in the settings.

Seletziona una cartella in ue %1$s at a archiviare sos capìtulos iscarrigados, sas còpias de seguresa e àteru. 
 
Si cussìgiat una cartella dedicada. 
 
Cartella seletzionada: %2$s
Updating from an older version and not sure what to select? Refer to the Tachiyomi upgrade section on the Mihon storage guide for more information.
To install the app on updates.
Retzi notìficas pro agiornamentos de sa biblioteca e àteru.
Impreu de sa bateria in s\'isfundu
Èvita interrutziones a agiornamentos longos de sa biblioteca, iscarrigamentos, e riprìstinos de còpias de seguresa.
Pick how categories appear in your library. You can switch any time from settings.
All categories scroll together in a single list, with category headers between them.
Each category gets its own tab at the top, so only one category is visible at a time.
Isbloca pro atzèdere a sa Biblioteca
Formadu de su capìtulu non vàlidu
Annanghende %1$s a sa lista de agiornamentu
%1$s est giai in sa lista de isetu
Ammustra sas categorias bòidas cando ses filtrende
Peruna currispondèntzia cun sos filtros tuos
Sos manga in custa categoria s\'ant a tramudare a sa categoria predefinida.
Esistit giai una categoria cun custu nùmene!
Su nùmene de sa categoria non podet èssere bòidu
Incarca a longu pro modificare una categoria
Non bi sunt agiornamentos disponìbiles noos
Sa biblioteca tua est bòida, podes annànghere sèries a sa biblioteca tua dae sos Catàlogos.
Perunu resurtadu agatadu pro sos filtros atuales tuos
Move sas categorias dinàmicas minimadas cara a giosso
Cando agrupas sa biblioteca pro fonte, istadu, etz.
Atzione cun un\'incarcu longu in su brincadore de categoria
Mark duplicate read chapter as read
Si podet agatare fintzas ismanniende sos filtros de sa biblioteca
Cua su butone pro incumintzare a lèghere
Ammustra sos oros de sas coberteddas
Cua sas iconas de sos non lèghidos
Ammustra sas iconas de sos non lèghidos
Ammustra su nùmeru de sos non lèghidos
Toca s\'icona de sa Biblioteca pro ammustrare sos filtros
Est racumandadu a permìtere sas notìficas pro mantènnere sa biblioteca e s\'aplicatzione tua atualizadas.
Sos agiornamentos mannos diant pòdere batire a un\'impreu de sa bateria prus mannu e a unu rallentamentu de sas fontes. Toca pro nde ischire de prus.
Dae cara: sos iscarrigamentos de massa mannos diant pòdere rallentare sas fontes e/o blocare Tachiyomi. Toca pro nde ischire de prus.
Brincadu ca sa sèrie est acabada
Brincadu ca bi sunt capìtulos non lèghidos
Brincadu ca non bi sunt capìtulos lèghidos
Brincadu ca sa sèrie non tenet bisòngiu de agiornamentos
No update errors from the last run.
No titles were skipped during the last run.
No library update has run yet.
Frecuèntzia de agiornamentu de sa biblioteca
Agiorna sos menga petzi si non bi sunt capìtulos non lèghidos (lèghidu de su totu)
Agiorna petzi cando sas cunditziones benint rispetadas
Ordinende in manera alfebètica ignora sos artìculos (unu, una, su, sa) a s\'incumintzu de sos tìtulos de sos manga
Categorias de incluire in s\'agiornamentu globale
Annoa fintzas sas coberteddas in sa biblioteca cando ses agiornende sa biblioteca
Butones in fundu a su leghidore
Unos cantos butones si podent agatare in àteros logos, si inoghe sunt disabilitados
Sos impòsitos de chirca s\'ant a ammustrare in manera periòdica. Incarca a longu in un\'impòsitu pro lu chircare.
Reseta sa cronologia de sos capìtulos
Custu at a bogare s\'istadu de leghidura dae \"%1$s\". Seguru ses\?
Reseta totu sos capìtulos pro custu %1$s
Perunu manga lèghidu o agiornadu dae pagu
Incarchende a longu podes fintzas resetare sa cronologia de sos capìtulos
Seguru ses? As a pèrdere totu sa cronologia.
Ammustra su butone pro resetare sa cronologia
Ammustra sos capìtulos lèghidos in Agrupadu e in Totu
Unu pagu de tempus a como
Influentzat sas coberteddas de sa grìllia de sa biblioteca
All hidden entries for this tab will be restored.
Verìfica su situ web cun sa visualizatzione web
Agiornamentos de sas estensiones in suspesu
Installa e avia Shizuku pro l\'impreare comente installadore de estensiones.
Allows extensions to be installed without user prompts and enables automatic updates for devices under Android 12
Legacy installer is not yet implemented, currently falling back to PackageInstaller (Default)
Malicious extensions can read any stored login credentials or execute arbitrary code.\n\nBy trusting this extension you accept these risks.
Cust\'estensione no est prus a disponimentu.
Custa estensione non benit dae sa lista de estensiones ufitziales de Tachiyomi.
S\'otimizatzione MIUI depet èssere istudada pro installare estensiones.
Unas cantas estensiones diant pòdere galu pedire de èssere installadas in antis.
No est istadu possìbile carrigare s\'immàgine
Cheres impostare custa immàgine comente cobertedda\?
Cambiende custu as a resetare sa modalidade de leghidura pro custa sèrie
Imposta sa prima pàgina comente cobertedda
Imposta sa de duas pàginas comente cobertedda
Ànima sas transitziones de sas pàginas
Lestresa de s\'animatzione de su tocu dòpiu
Ammustra su nùmeru de sa pàgina

Su nùmeru de pàginas de pre-carrigare durante sa leghidura. Valores prus artos ant a frunire un\'esperièntzia de leghidura prus flùida, in càmbiu de un\'impreu prus mannu de sa memòria temporànea e de sa retza ìnternet.
Mìnimat sa creatzione de bandas, ma diat pòdere influentzare sas prestatziones
Nàviga pro iscùrrere a intro de sa pàgina ismanniada
Partzi in duos sas pàginas dòpias in modalidade verticale
Imprea unu filtru de colore personalizadu
Modalidade de fusione de su filtru colore
Brinca sos capìtulos marcados comente lèghidos
Fùrria sas teclas de su volume
Abbistu (basadu subra de sa pàgina e de su tema)
Ammustra semper sa transitzione de capìtulu
Si custa optzione est disabilitada sa pàgina de transitzione s\'at a brincare, sa borta chi benit chi unu capìtulu s\'at a carrigare
Incumintza a pustis de su ritàlliu
Su cumportamentu de s\'àrea segada s\'àplicat petzi in sa modalidade verticale cun unas cantas castas de iscala
On devices older than Android 9.0, you need to set cutout settings manually through your system settings
Ammustra sos cuntenutos in s\'àrea de retàlliu
Cando impreas sa dispositzione automàtica de sas pàginas podes galu colare dae una dispositzione a s\'àtera durante sa leghidura chene subraiscrìere custa impostatzione
Creates folders according to manga title
Sensibilidade pro cuare su menù cun s\'iscurrimentu
Mannària màssima pro sa decodìfica hardware (bitmap) de sas immàgines
Si su leghidore càrrigat un\'immàgine bianca, mìnima de pagu a pagu su lìmite.\nSeletzionadu: %s
Sa pàgina de sos detàllios de custu elementu si depet pompiare in antis de pòdere tramudare
Tenes un\'elementu in sa biblioteca tua cun su matessi nùmene ma dae una fonte diferente (%1$s). \n \nBoles sighire su matessi\?
Marcare totu sos capìtulos comente lèghidos\?
Marcare totu sos capìtulos comente non lèghidos\?
Sync your reading progress with your services
Couldn’t search %1$s. Check your connection and try again.
Your %1$s session has expired. Sign in again to keep tracking.
Totu francu sos capìtulos in sos sinnalibros
Ammustra sos capìtulos in sos sinnalibros
Cua sos tìtulos de sos capìtulos
Òrdina cun s\'òrdine de sas mitzas
Dae sos prus noos a sos prus betzos
Dae sos prus betzos a sos prus noos
Pro praghere annanghe su manga a sa biblioteca tua in antis de fàghere custu
Source %1$d is still loading. Retry once installed plugins finish registering.
B\'at àpidu un\'errore sarvende sa cobertedda
B\'at àpidu un\'errore cumpartende sa cobertedda

Sincronizatzione a una diretzione ebbia pro agiornare su progressu in sos capìtulos in su servìtziu de arrastamentu. Imposta s\'arrastamentu pro sos elementos de sos manga dae su butone de arrastamentu issoro.
Servìtzios chi frunint funtzionalidades avantzadas pro fontes ispetzìficas. Sos mangas benint arrastados in manera automàtica cando los annanghes a sa biblioteca tua.
Agiorna s\'arrastamentu a pustis de sa leghidura
Agiorna s\'arrastamentu cando as marcadu comente lèghidu
S\'arrastadore non si podet bogare dae %1$s cando no est in lìnia
Mantene·los totu sos duos in %1$s e remplasa in locale ebbia
Agiorna sa genia de votu de %1$s
No at fatu a agiornare sa genia de votu: %1$s
Data de incumintzu de sa leghidura
Data de fine de sa leghidura
Pro praghere torra a intrare a MAL
Ischerta una mitza e ischerta un\'elementu de tramudare
Datos de incluire in su tramudòngiu
Inclue paràmetros de chirca in prus cando ses chirchende
Imprea sa mitza cun prus capìtulos (prus lentu)
Imprea sa prima mitza cun un\'alternativa
Brinca custu passu, sa borta chi benit
Pro ammustrare torra cust\'ischermada bae a Impostatziones -> Mitzas.
Perunu capìtulu agatadu. Custu manga non si podet impreare pro su tramudòngiu
Ponet in pàusa sa cronologia de leghidura
Otzèanu birde abba (teal - fògia de tè)
S\'ischermu seguru cuat sos cuntenutos de s\'aplicatzione cando mudas de aplicatzione e blocat sas ischermadas
Cua automaticamente su butone de navigatzione
Alliniamentu de s\'icona de navigatzione laterale
Sighende sas impostatziones predefinidas sa navigatzione laterale s\'impreat in unos cantos telefoneddos e in sas tauleddas minores cando sunt in orizontale. e semper in sas tauleddas prus mannas
Sighi su tema de su sistema
Butones de su tema basados subra de sa cobertedda
Tint the manga page accent, header and chapter colors using the cover\'s palette
Ammustra una barra de sas ainas prus larga in pitzos de sa parte manna de sas pàginas (non si bidet in sos dispositivos prus minores nointames s\'impostatzione)
Disable screen transitions and other in-app animations
Cua su cuntenutu de sas notìficas
Incarca \"in segus\" pro torrare a s\'ischermada de incumintzu
Unas cantas limbas diant pòdere bisongiare chi torres a allùghere s\'aplicatzione pro las ammustrare comente si tocat
Ammustra sas fontes impreadas dae pagu
Includet sas leghiduras reghentes, sos agiornamentos e sas sèries annantas
Sos incurtziadòrgios de sas sèries aberint sos capìtulos noos
Cando non b\'ant a èssere capìtulos noos, imbetzes, s\'ant a abèrrere sos detàllios de sa sèrie
Podet èssere impreada pro ripristinare sa biblioteca atuale
Riprìstina sa biblioteca dae una còpia de seguresa
Su riprìstinu est giai in cursu
Sa còpia de seguresa est giai in cursu
Cartella de sa còpia de seguresa
Frecuèntzia de sarvatàgiu de sas còpias de seguresa
Documentu de sa còpia de seguresa non vàlidu
Casta de documentu de còpia de seguresa non vàlidu: %1$s \nDiat dèpere acabbare cun .proto.gz o .json.
Sa còpia de seguresa non tenet perunu manga.
Perunu elementu in biblioteca de pònnere in sa còpia de seguresa
Riprìstinu de sa còpia de seguresa fallidu
Arrastadores a sos cales no as fatu atzessu:

Sos datos dae su documentu de sa còpia de seguresa s\'ant a ripristinare. \n \nA pustis as a dèpere installare sas estensiones chi mancant e atzèdere a sos servìtzios de arrastamentu pro los pòdere impreare.
Sas còpias de seguresa automàticas sunt racumandadas meda. Dias dèpere tènnere còpias fintzas in àteros logos.
De ite cheres fàghere una còpia de seguresa\?
Sa còpia de seguresa e su riprìstinu diant pòdere non funtzionare comente si tocat si s\'otimizatzione MIUI est disabilitada.
Include sensitive settings (e.g. tracker login tokens)
Isbòida sa memòria temporànea de sos capìtulos
Annoa sa memòria de iscarrigamentu temporànea

Custu at a fortzare unu càrculu nou de sa memòria temporànea de iscarrigamentu. Est ùtile si as modificadu sos documentos iscarrigados in foras de custa aplicatzione e boles chi s\'aplicatzione los rilevet
Proa funtzionalidades noas in antis chi siant intregadas in maneras ufitziale. Sas versiones beta diant pòdere no èssere istàbiles e benint frunidas pro dare informatziones a s\'isvilupadore.
Sa torrada a sa versione de produtzione anteposta diat pòdere causare problemas e bisongiare de un\'isboidadura de sa memòria temporànea de s\'aplicatzione.
Sas versiones beta diat pòdere no èssere istàbiles e diant pòdere bisongiare de un\'isboidadura de sa memòria temporànea de s\'aplicatzione.
Iscàrriga sos registros de sos arrestos anòmalos
Sarva sos registros de sos errores in unu documentu pro lu cumpartzire cun sos isvilupadores
Unos cantos produtores tenent restritziones de s\'aplicatzione chi istudant sos servìtzios in s\'isfundu. Custu situ web tenet informatziones in prus in subra de comente acontzare su problema.
Registros de sos arrestos anòmalos sarvados
Print verbose logs to system log (may reduces app performance)
Istringa de agente de utente predefinida
Istringa de agente de utente non vàlida
Tenet bisòngiu chi torres a allùghere s\'aplicatzione pro tènnere efetu
%1$d elementos chi non sunt in sa biblioteca in sa base de datos
Iscantzella sa cronologia pro sos elementos chi non sunt sarvados in sa biblioteca tua
Seguru ses\? Sos capìtulos lèghidos e su progressu de sos elementos chi non sunt in sa biblioteca s\'ant a pèrdere
Mantene sos elementos cun capìtulos lèghidos
Agiorna sos metadatos de sa biblioteca
Agiornat sas coberteddas, sos gèneres, sa descritzione e sas informatziones de istadu de sos manga
Agiornat s\'istadu, su votu e s\'ùrtimu capìtulu lèghidu dae sos servìtzios de arrastamentu
Iscantzella sas cartellas de sos capìtulos chi no esistint, as iscarrigadu petzi in parte, o as giai lèghidu
Inneta sos manga chi non sunt in sa biblioteca
Disabìlita custa optzione si ses tenende problemas agiornende o ripristinende sa biblioteca tua
S\'otimizatzione de sa bateria est giai disabilitada
Inneta sas coberteddas in sa memòria temporànea
Iscantzella sas coberteddas betzas e no impreadas de sos manga in sa biblioteca tua chi sunt istados agiornados. \nImpreende como: %1$s
Iscantzella sas coberteddas in sa memòria temporànea chi non sunt in sa biblioteca
Iscantzella sas coberteddas in sa memòria temporànea chi non sunt in sa biblioteca \nImpreende como: %1$s
Sa parte manna de sos elementos
Unas cantas estensiones si diant non pòdere agiornare in manera automàtica si sunt istadas installadas in foras de custa aplicatzione
Cua sos elementos giai in sa biblioteca
Abìlita, pro su tramudòngiu, petzi sas mitzas apicadas tuas
Abìlita, pro su tramudòngiu, petzi sas mitzas abilitadas como
Imprea sas ùrtimas preferèntzias e mitzas de pre-tramudòngiu sarvadas pro tramudare in massa
Podes fintzas tramudare ischertende sos manga in sa biblioteca tua
Ghia a su tramudòngiu de sas mitzas
Ammustra in sa lista de sas mitzas e de sas estensiones
Custu no impedit a estensiones no ufitziales o potentzialmente non curretas de ammustrare cuntenutos NSFW (18+) in s\'aplicatzione.
Couldn’t add this repository. Check the URL and your connection, then try again.
Couldn’t refresh repositories. Check your connection and try again.
Paste the full index.min.json URL supplied by the repository maintainer.
Paste a repository URL to validate its index and make its novel sources available.
No manga repositories yet. Add one above to browse more extensions.
No novel repositories yet. Add one above to browse novel sources.
Novel repo is empty. Add a repo that contains novel sources.
Remove “%s” from this device? You can add it again later.
Repository signing key already in use
“%1$s” uses the same signing key as “%2$s”. Replace “%2$s” only if you trust “%1$s” as its intended successor.
Imbia raportos a pitzu de sos arrestos anòmalos
Agiudat a acontzare cale si siat faddina. Perunu datu sensìbile at a èssere imbiadu
Ite b\'at de nou in custa versione
Su nùmene de impreadore e sa crae non podent abarrare bòidos
Move sa sèrie cara a pitzos
Sos iscarrigamentos si podent annullare traghende·los a foras \nFaghe iscùrrere custu impòsitu pro lu bogare
In custu momentu non b\'at nudda in iscarrigamentu
Bìsita s\'ischeda de sos reghentes pro atzèdere a sa lista de isetu de sos iscarrigamentos. Podes fintzas tocare duas bortas o incarcare a longu pro un\'atzessu prus lestru
Iscarrigamentu de sos capìtulos fallidu pro neghe de su pagu ispàtziu lìberu in su discu
No at fatu a partzire s\'immàgine iscarrigada
May fix issue with downloaded chapters conflicts with one another when they have the same name
B\'at àpidu un\'errore imprevistu durante s\'iscarrigamentu de su capìtulu
Iscantzella cando est marcadu comente non lèghidu
Permite s\'iscantzelladura de sos capìtulos cun sinnalibros
Iscantzella a pustis de sa leghidura
Iscàrriga in automàticu durante sa letura
Funtzionat petzi cun sos elementos in biblioteca e si su capìtulu atuale e cussu imbeniente sunt giai iscarrigados
Iscantzella sos capìtulos iscarrigados si sa mitza at bogadu su capìtulu in lìnia
Iscantzella durante sos agiornamentos globales, pedi in sa pàgina de sos capìtulos
Megiorat su rendimentu de su leghidore
Tempus coladu in su leghidore, basadu subra de sa cronologia de sos capìtulos
Pòmpia sas istatìsticas a sa minuda
Perunu datu agatadu pro sos filtros atuales tuos
Peruna aplicatzione pro ischertare documentos agatada
Non s\'est pòdidu otènnere s\'atzessu permanente a sa cartella. S\'aplicatzione si diat pòdere cumportare in manera no isetada.
Toca inoghe pro agiudu cun Cloudflare
Agiorna s\'aplicatzione de WebView pro otènnere una cumpatibilidade prus manna
Pro chi s\'aplicatzione funtzionet b\'at bisòngiu de WebView
Pro Tachiyomi b\'at bisòngiu de WebView
Pòmpia sos elementos de biblioteca tuos agiornados dae pagu
Su widget no est a disponimentu cando su blocu de s\'aplicatzione est abilitadu
Marca un\'intervallu de capìtulos comente lèghidos
Marca un\'intervallu de capìtulos comente non lèghidos
Sinna sos capìtulos antepostos comente lèghidos
Marca sos capìtulos antepostos comente non lèghidos
Are you sure you wish to delete your saved search query: \'%1$s\'?
%s ran into an unexpected error. We suggest you screenshot this message, dump the crash logs, and then share it to a GitHub Issue.

Do you wish to load images through the Hentai@Home Network, if available? Disabling this option will reduce the amount of pages you are able to view
Options:
- Any client (Recommended)
- Default port clients only (Can be slower. Enable if behind firewall/proxy that blocks outgoing non-standard ports.)
Show Japanese titles in search results
Currently showing Japanese titles in search results. Clear the chapter cache after changing this (in the Advanced section)
Currently showing English/Romanized titles in search results. Clear the chapter cache after changing this (in the Advanced section)
Opens a webview to your E/ExHentai watched tags page

You can soft filter tags by adding them to the \"My Tags\" E/ExHentai page with a negative weight. If a gallery has tags that add up to weight below this value, it is filtered from view. This threshold can be set between -9999 and 0. Currently: %1$d

Recently uploaded galleries will be included on the watched screen if it has at least one watched tag with positive weight, and the sum of weights on its watched tags add up to this value or higher. This threshold can be set between 0 and 9999. Currently: %1$d

If you wish to hide galleries in certain languages from the gallery list and searches, select them in the dialog that will popup.\nNote that matching galleries will never appear regardless of your search query.\nTldr checkmarked = exclude
What categories would you like to show by default on the front page and in searches? They can still be enabled by enabling their filters
When browsing ExHentai/E-Hentai should the watched list filter be enabled by default
The quality of the downloaded images
Enable/Disable the enhanced browse menu made for E/ExHentai

Favorites are only downloaded from ExHentai. Any changes to favorites in the app will not be uploaded. Prevents accidental loss of favorites on ExHentai. Note that removals will still be downloaded (if you remove a favorites on ExHentai, it will be removed in the app as well).
Show some information regarding the favorites sync feature

Do not abort immediately when encountering errors during the sync process. Errors will still be displayed when the sync is complete. Can cause loss of favorites in some cases. Useful when syncing large libraries.

Performs a full resynchronization on the next sync. Removals will not be synced. All favorites in the app will be re-uploaded to ExHentai and all favorites on ExHentai will be re-downloaded into the app. Useful for repairing sync after sync has been interrupted.
%1$s Sync will not start until the gallery is in only one category.
An error occurred during the sync process: %1$s
Errors occurred during the sync process that were ignored:\n%1$s
Failed to fetch favorites from remote server!
Unable to delete galleries from the remote servers!
Adding gallery %1$d of %2$d to remote server
Unable to add gallery to remote server: \'%1$s\' (GID: %2$s)!
Removing gallery %1$d of %2$d from local library
Adding gallery %1$d of %2$d to local library
Remote gallery does not exist, skipping: %1$s!
Failed to add gallery to local database:
The gallery: %1$s is in more than one category (%2$s)!
%1$s\n\nSync is currently throttling (to avoid being banned from ExHentai) and may take a long time to complete.

1. Changes to category names in the app are NOT synced! Please change the category names on ExHentai instead. The category names will be copied from the ExHentai servers every sync.

2. The favorite categories on ExHentai correspond to the first 10 categories in the app (excluding the \'Default\' category). Galleries in other categories will NOT be synced!

3. ENSURE YOU HAVE A STABLE INTERNET CONNECTION WHEN SYNC IS IN PROGRESS! If the internet disconnects while the app is syncing, your favorites may be left in a partially-synced state.

4. Keep the app open while favorites are syncing. Android will close apps that are in the background sometimes and that could be bad if it happens while the app is syncing.

5. Do NOT put favorites in multiple categories (the app supports this). This can confuse the sync algorithm as ExHentai only allows each favorite to be in one category.

This dialog will only popup once. You can read these notes again by going to \'Settings > E-Hentai > Show favorites sync notes\'.
Resetting the sync state can cause your next sync to be extremely slow.
Are you sure you wish to sync your favorites with E-Hentai?
%1$s will currently never check galleries in your library for updates.
%1$s checks/updates galleries in batches. This means it will wait %2$d hour(s), check %3$d galleries, wait %2$d hour(s), check %3$d and so on…
The updater last ran %1$s, and checked %2$d out of the %3$d galleries that were ready for checking.
The updater has not ran yet.

Galleries that were checked in the last:
- hour: %1$d
- 6 hours: %2$d
- 12 hours: %3$d
- day: %4$d
- 2 days: %5$d
- week: %6$d
- month: %7$d
- year: %8$d

The app will now add a new settings profile on E-Hentai and ExHentai to optimize app performance. Please ensure that you have less than three profiles on both sites.\n\nIf you have no idea what settings profiles are, then it probably doesn\'t matter, just hit \'OK\'.
An error occurred during the configuration process: %1$s
Please wait, this may take some time…
You are out of profile slots on %1$s, please delete a profile!
Some users cannot access ExHentai the normal way, and have to pass in a specific igneous cookie value, this option is for those users.
Failed to refresh igneous cookie. Make sure you are logged in to E-Hentai and have ExHentai access.
This is a experimental feature that will disable all hentai features if toggled off
Apply %1$s enhancements to the following sources if they are installed: %2$s
Hide extensions/sources that are incompatible with %1$s. Force-restart app after changing.

Example:

http://e-hentai.org/g/12345/1a2b3c4e
http://g.e-hentai.org/g/67890/6f7g8h9i
http://exhentai.org/g/13579/1a3b5c7e
https://exhentai.org/g/24680/2f4g6h8i

It also supports E-H Visited exported data
Enter the galleries to add (separated by a new line):
You must specify at least one gallery to add!
Failed to update chapters for gallery: %1$s!
Automatically scroll to the next page in the specified interval. Interval is specified in seconds.
Re-add all failed pages to the download queue.

Normally the downloader can only download a specific amount of pages at the same time. This means you can be waiting for a page to download but the downloader will not start downloading the page until it has a free download slot. Pressing \'Boost page\' will force the downloader to begin downloading the current page, regardless of whether or not there is an available slot.
This page cannot be boosted (invalid page)!
Page failed to load, press the retry button instead!
This page has already been downloaded!
This page cannot be boosted (invalid page loader)!
This entry is already merged with the current entry!
This merged entry is a duplicate!
This will remove the entry from the merge, using this will also lose any unsaved changes applied to the merged entry
Sync MangaDex entries to your library
Pulls entries from MangaDex into your library if they are not already added.
Set your chosen MangaDex source, this will be used for follows and a bunch more features around the app
Syncs any non MdList tracked entries to MangaDex as reading.
Couldn\'t find the entry in the source!
An error occurred while loading your saved searches.
Are you sure you wish to delete your saved search query: \'%1$s\'?
Saved search invalid, filters have changed
Select which categories to show on the front page
Hide results already in your library
An error occurred during the search process: %1$s
Do not enlarge images smaller than the target size
View timing and count details from the last update check
Only run gallery update checks when conditions are met
Log in to access your MangaDex follows and reading statuses
Import your MangaDex follows into the local library
Push local library entries to your MangaDex follows list
Login to NovelUpdates, then tap the ✓ button to complete login.
Login to NovelList, then tap the ✓ button to complete login.
Login, then tap the ✓ button to complete.
Page viewers, double-tap, fullscreen, color filter
Text rendering, themes, TTS, custom CSS / JS
Preserve fonts from the source website
Break long paragraphs at sentence boundaries
Tap-to-scroll uses the navigator zones (top/bottom of the screen); double-tap and long-press fire anywhere and route to the action you pick above.
No app installed to handle Define
No app installed to handle Translate
Allow novel chapters to be translated
Manage engines, languages, cache, and provider setup
Render translated chapter text in the novel reader
Serve translated chapters from local cache instead of calling the API again
Skip translation when the detected language already matches the target
Simple is fast provider translation; advanced uses per-series canon and glossary memory
Send previous translated paragraphs as context to LLM engines
Name: Value pairs separated by semicolons or line breaks
%1$s can run without a key in Hayai. If it stops working, choose an API-backed or local engine.
ChatGPT Plus/Pro and Google AI subscriptions do not provide API access to Hayai. Use an API key, an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, or a local engine such as Ollama.
Choose which source provides each manga info field
Choose which enriched sections are visible for this series
Reset display options to global defaults
No app installed to handle Web Search
Run scripts embedded in EPUB chapters (off for security)
Block images and embedded media in both readers
Tap a paragraph to start TTS there
Continue TTS while the reader is closed; shows a persistent notification
More TTS options are available inside the reader (long-press TTS button).
No rules. Tap + to add one.
Maps stylized text (𝒇𝓻𝓮𝓮 → free, ｆｒｅｅ → free) and strips invisible joiners so rules match obfuscated promos.
Removes all non-ASCII characters. Leave OFF for Japanese/Chinese/Korean novels.
Are you sure you want to delete this quote?
No quotes saved. Long-press text in a chapter to add one.
New chapters are predicted around %1$s, checking around every %2$s.
This series is completed or does not have a predicted release date yet.
Predict release timing for library updates, manga details, and upcoming releases.
Foras de su perìodu de publicatzione prevìdidu
Skipped because no release was expected yet
Smart release prediction is turned off
A preset with this name already exists
